subject: English
title: Going places

sections.heading: Going places
sections.content:
Take a bus
Or take a train,
Take a boat
Or take a plane,
Take a taxi,
Take a car,
Maybe near
Or maybe far,
Sight words
take | is | the | or | two | may be |
Unit 3
Going places
Chapter 1
Come Back Soon 
Let us recite
Reprint 2026-27
38 Mridang
Let us speak
1. Have you ever travelled by a bus or a train?
2. Where did you go?
3. What did you eat on the way?
4. What did you see from the window?
5. Who else went with you?
6. Did you have fun? Share it with the class.
Take a rocket
To the moon,
But be sure
To come back soon.
New words
train | boat | plane | taxi | near | rocket |
Reprint 2026-27
39Mridang
Note to the teacher
• You may encourage the child to visualise and draw any vehicle.
The vehicle may be imaginary or real. The vehicle may have
wheels or wings. Accept all ideas.
Everybody stop,
Everybody stand,
Everybody sit,
and raise your hand.
Let us listen
A. Listen to your teacher and read out a poem.
Everybody jump,
Everybody run,
Everybody stop,
Oh! What fun.
A. Draw the vehicle that you like the most.
Let us draw
Reprint 2026-27
40 Mridang
Sort out the different means of transport given in the boxes
depending on the surface they move on. The first one has
been done for you.
Make a List
Let us write
Note to the teacher
• Help children to classify the names of vehicles.
• Some of the words may be unfamiliar to the children, you may
help by describing them.
bus car aeroplane train jeep
ship boat bicycle helicopter truck
yacht cart raft taxi tractor
Land Air Water
Bus
Reprint 2026-27
41Mridang
Vowel Sound ‘u’
Let us speak
Note to the teacher
• This introduces young learners to the vowel sound ‘u’ as in ‘hut’.
• Help them notice that the word ‘an’ occurs before the words
beginning with ‘u’ in the above table.
Read the words below each picture.
an umbrella a truck a duck
a jug a mug a cup
a bus a rug a hut
Reprint 2026-27

learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of Going places
Identify and explain the main ideas covered in this chapter
Apply knowledge from this chapter to real-world situations
Recall important terms and definitions from Going places
